title: Creator Create SMP
description: A Modpack for a Creator server with Create mod as the main!
body:
# 💙 Creator Create SMP – A Collaborative Engineering Adventure

Welcome to Creator Create SMP, a streamlined yet powerful modpack centered around the Create Mod. Designed for builders, redstoners, and content creators alike, this pack focuses on mechanical creativity and community collaboration.

🔧 Key Features:

    ⚙️ Built Around the Create Mod
    Master kinetic engineering, automate production lines, and build mind-blowing contraptions. 
    
    The Create Mod is the heart of this experience.

    🤝 Community-Centered SMP
    Join forces with fellow creators on a dedicated server built for collaboration, sharing, and large-scale mechanical projects.

    🎥 Made for Creators
    Smooth performance, clean visuals, and useful tools make this pack ideal for streaming, YouTube series, or just showing off your builds.

    🛠️ Lightweight Enhancements
    Carefully selected quality-of-life mods enhance your experience without straying from the Create-centric vision.
